name: ai-hiring-decoder
description: tyr — four frontier LLMs and three ATS parsers read your resume in parallel; where they agree, where they disagree, and what that gap means.

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types lib/parsers/__tests__/normalize.test.ts lib/parsers/__tests__/employers.test.ts lib/parsers/__tests__/determinism.test.ts lib/parsers/__tests__/bullet-metrics.test.ts lib/agents/__tests__/disagreement.test.ts lib/disagreement/__tests__/pairwise.test.ts lib/llm/__tests__/cache.test.ts lib/llm/__tests__/embed.test.ts lib/llm/__tests__/prompts.test.ts lib/llm/__tests__/perceive.test.ts lib/agents/__tests__/perception-disagreement.test.ts lib/agents/__tests__/ai-legibility.test.ts lib/agents/__tests__/synthesize-summary.test.ts components/upload/__tests__/target-validation.test.ts lib/scroll/__tests__/easings.test.ts
